query: SELECT CASE WHEN id < 1000 THEN '0-999' WHEN id < 60000 THEN '1000-59999' WHEN id < 70000 THEN '60000-69999' WHEN id < 80000 THEN '70000-79999' WHEN id < 90000 THEN '80000-89999' ELSE '90000+' END as rango, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_img FROM recipes GROUP BY rango ORDER BY rango;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3N8WHcqSjo6gJV1.8cb8a16f7acb --database ndjzMo7PxeapbzLjBHjsKj --execute SELECT CASE WHEN id < 1000 THEN '0-999' WHEN id < 60000 THEN '1000-59999' WHEN id < 70000 THEN '60000-69999' WHEN id < 80000 THEN '70000-79999' WHEN id < 90000 THEN '80000-89999' ELSE '90000+' END as rango, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_img FROM recipes GROUP BY rango ORDER BY rango;
